company.name: The Fluted Mushroom
company.description: Pittsburgh's preferred caterer, specializing in custom events with tasteful simplicity and elegant design.
company.contact_note: As Pittsburgh's preferred caterer, we pride ourselves on sweating the small stuff to ensure your event is flawless, right down to the last bite.
company.general_notes: All prices are subject to change. Additional menu items and seasonal selections are available. Custom pricing may apply.

stationary_hors_doeuvres.label: Stationary Hors d'Oeuvres
stationary_hors_doeuvres.description: Complete displays with all components included - ready-to-serve

items.name: Domestic Cheese Display
items.description: A selection of sliced domestic cheeses, garnished with clusters of grapes, served with assorted crackers and mustard dip

items.name: Gourmet Cheese Display
items.description: A selection of domestic and imported cheeses, sliced fresh fruit, crab, artichoke and jalapeño dip, and pesto Parmesan soufflé, served with crackers, toasted pita triangles, baguette slices and mustard dip

items.name: Mediterranean Table
items.description: Housemade chickpea hummus with grape leaves, baba ganoush, marinated roasted peppers, feta cheese, artichokes and kalamata olives, served with pita and flat breads

items.name: Antipasto Station
items.description: Italian-cured meats and cheeses, assorted grilled and marinated vegetables and imported olives, served with focaccia sticks and crostini

items.name: Sliced Filet of Beef
items.description: The finest cut of beef sliced and served with silver dollar rolls, housemade horseradish mousse and caramelized onions

items.name: Miniature Sandwiches
items.description: Roast beef and provolone, turkey and havarti, ham and swiss

items.name: Gourmet Miniature Sandwiches
items.description: Sliced filet of beef with horseradish mousse, smoked turkey with cranberry mayonnaise, brie with sun-dried tomatoes and fresh basil

items.name: Smoked Salmon Display
items.description: Presented with capers, red onion, lemon wedges, chopped egg, pink peppercorn sauce and black bread triangles

items.name: Poached Salmon Display
items.description: Presented with crème fraîche, cucumber, lemon, capers, red onion, egg whites and pumpernickel toast

duet_sit_down_selections.label: Duet Sit-Down Selections
duet_sit_down_selections.description: Two smaller portions (petit cuts) served on one plate. Each guest selects one duet combination, one salad, one starch, and one vegetable. Rolls and butter included.

buffet_dinner_selections.label: Buffet Dinner Selections
buffet_dinner_selections.description: Buffet-style service. Each guest selects one package with 2 main items, one salad, two different starches, and one vegetable. Rolls and butter included.

salads.label: Choose One Salad

professional_service.label: Professional Service
professional_service.description: Our coordinators and catering staff will execute your plan with grace, allowing you to enjoy the event.
professional_service.service_scope: Service begins at load-in at The Fluted Mushroom and ends at load-out at The Fluted Mushroom.
professional_service.client_responsibility: All linens and rentals are the client's responsibility — our staff is happy to assist in any coordination needed.
professional_service.general_notes: All prices are subject to change.

bar_services.name: Full Bar Service
bar_services.pricing_note: Charged according to client's request and alcohol consumed

bar_services.name: Bar Service with Soda, Mixers and Bar Fruit
Bar Service
bar_services.description: If client provides alcohol and non-alcoholic beverages

notes_and_disclaimers.pricing: All prices are subject to change.
notes_and_disclaimers.seasonal: Additional menu items and seasonal selections are available.
notes_and_disclaimers.custom: Custom pricing may apply to specialized menus.
notes_and_disclaimers.general: As Pittsburgh's preferred caterer, we pride ourselves on sweating the small stuff to ensure your event is flawless, right down to the last bite.
